tagline: From invisible to page one — organic growth that compounds.
description: NovaSaaS had strong product-market fit but virtually no organic presence. We turned their blog into a lead engine in six months, cutting their dependence on paid channels and building traffic that keeps growing long after the engagement.
challenge: NovaSaaS ranked for almost zero transactional keywords despite a technically sound product. Paid acquisition costs were climbing month-over-month and the marketing team needed a sustainable, owned channel. Their existing blog had 40+ articles that were generating no traffic due to poor keyword targeting, weak internal linking, and no structured data.
solution: We rebuilt their content strategy from the ground up around high-intent buyer keywords mapped to each funnel stage. Legacy articles were refreshed with updated data, better headings, and answer-engine optimisation markup. A targeted link-building campaign focused on SaaS-adjacent publications secured 28 new referring domains in the first quarter alone. We also implemented a content velocity system so their in-house writer could publish two SEO-optimised posts per week without bottlenecks.

testimonial.quote: growX didn't just deliver traffic — they delivered qualified buyers. Our sales team noticed the difference within 60 days and we've since cut our paid spend by 40%.
testimonial.author: Priya Nair
testimonial.title: Head of Marketing, NovaSaaS
